subjects.heroSentence: This account won 10 of 22 long-shot bets that the market gave roughly a 12 percent chance. By luck you would expect about 2.73 wins. A record this strong is consistent with informed trading — not proof of it.

scorecard.formula: average of the market's odds at entry
scorecard.numbers: Average entry odds ~12% across 29 bets — concentrated in long shots (≤20%).

scorecard.formula: chance of ≥ 10 wins in 22 tries at 12% each
scorecard.numbers: Won 10 of 22 independent bets the market priced at ~12% — about 2.73 expected by luck. Probability by chance ≈ 1 in 7.6K (7 correlated bets de-correlated).

scorecard.formula: largest event position ÷ this wallet's median bet
scorecard.numbers: Largest position $195,008 is ~310× this wallet's median bet ($630) — an informed bet that dwarfs its own trading norm (the within-trader size anomaly).

subjects.heroSentence: This account placed a single $33K bet at roughly 7 percent on “Maduro out by January 31, 2026?” and cashed out about $437K. One bet is not statistically improbable on its own — but a lone, outsized, high-conviction long-shot like this, alongside the other signals, is the single-bet insider signature. Consistent with informed trading, not proof of it.

scorecard.formula: one large long-shot win held to resolution
